description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a global before_script and after_script executing "date". Use the python:3.5.2 Docker image for all jobs. Define a test stage with a job_tests job that runs "bash build_script.sh run_tests". Add a pages job that also uses python:3.5.2, runs only on the master branch, executes "bash build_script.sh build_pages", and publishes the "public" directory as a Pages artifact. No services, caches, or extra variables are needed.
